'''âw-sh-m-ch''' ('''kawashmechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadsett|wadsett]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadsett|wadsett]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-sh-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawashmechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwashmechoko|thiwashmechoko]] || [[word:jiwashmechoko|jiwashmechoko]] || [[word:shiwashmechoko|shiwashmechoko]] || [[word:kiwashmechoko|kiwashmechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwashmechoko|thuthuwashmechoko]] || [[word:jujuwashmechoko|jujuwashmechoko]] || [[word:shushuwashmechoko|shushuwashmechoko]] || [[word:kukuwashmechoko|kukuwashmechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwashmechoko|thuwashmechoko]] || [[word:juwashmechoko|juwashmechoko]] || [[word:shuwashmechoko|shuwashmechoko]] || [[word:kuwashmechoko|kuwashmechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwashmechoko|thĂŠwashmechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwashmechoko|jĂŠwashmechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwashmechoko|shĂŠwashmechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwashmechoko|kĂŠwashmechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
